data.name: College Gay Sex - Episode 8
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL featuring HD graphics, steamy ANIMATIONS, and realistic-looking characters.

It’s Cody’s birthday, and Jax has orchestrated a big surprise, involving a fake arrest and a night in a holding cell where fantasies become reality.

 

GAME DESCRIPTION

EPISODE 8

 

It’s Cody’s birthday, and Jax has orchestrated a surprise he’ll never see coming.

Knowing his housemate’s obsession with jail-themed fantasies, Jax hires a professional dom to play the role of a cop, setting the stage for a night he hopes Cody will never forget.

The plan is rather simple.

Jax will make sure they’re ‘arrested’ for indecent exposure just before midnight, and the fake officer will whisk them away to his Dungeon—a meticulously crafted holding cell, where Cody will face punishment for his misbehavior, straight out of his deepest fantasies.

Will Jax’s plan work smoothly?

Will Cody love his birthday surprise, or has Jax taken things too far?

 

Follow their story and find out.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations

- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
